Banyan-strangler spreading across temple ruins, trunk rooted in foundation cracks, branch-arms supporting weight via pillar-roots, centuries-patient architectural reclamation, stone-embracing growth.
Armillary navigator spanning twelve meters, nested brass rings rotating independently, zodiac engravings tracking stars, central world-orb updating coastlines real-time, cosmic positioning absolute.

Charcoal-sketch artist appearing two-dimensional frontally, smudged fingerprints permanently marking chassis, suggestive lines defining form ambiguously, easel-legs, graphite-dust exhaust, living drawing.
Pipe-organ leviathan surfacing from methane sea, tubes venting harmonic plumes, keyboard ribs playing atmospheric symphonies, whale-song transmitted through liquid hydrocarbon, titanic presence.
